response_body.note: 422 + JSON error body successfully delivered with APF warning text in Korean.

ui_result.error_message: I'm sorry but there was an error. Please try again.
ui_result.note: Copilot frontend shows generic error message, NOT the APF warning text from JSON body. The warning message IS in the response but Copilot's error handler shows its own fallback.

console_errors: Matched leaf route at location '/copilot/c/...' does not have an element or Component (React routing warning)

diagnosis.status_code: 422 Unprocessable Content — BUILD #21 CONFIRMED DEPLOYED AND WORKING
diagnosis.warning_text: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
diagnosis.observation: Build #21 is LIVE and working correctly at the network level. 422 status + JSON error body with {type: policy_violation, code: content_filter, message: APF warning in Korean}. However, Copilot's frontend catches the 422 and shows generic error instead of the APF message.
diagnosis.conclusion: 422 JSON error delivery CONFIRMED. APF warning text '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' IS delivered in the response body. But Copilot UI does NOT render it — shows generic fallback instead. Next step: either JS injection to show the message, or accept that the backend blocking works and the generic error is sufficient.
